g.text: Marid Gateway - @marid/gateway (API/ingress: tokens - scopes - rate-limit - audit - /marid attach + owns-union-bound mirroring; fronts reused HTTP+SSE API)
marid-telegram - channel gateway, a client (separate process - no provider keys)

Marid-added packages: red = @marid/gateway (Marid Gateway; marid-auth is its auth module), orange = marid-telegram (channel gateway, a client), dark = marid-instance. Neutral nodes are reused from OpenCode as-is.
